text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp has finally come to an end...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Another year, another productive summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes... Very funny. That is not what I meant, and you know it!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Although... I'd be lying if I said I wasn't grateful.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is right around the corner.
We must keep our resolve firm and—
choice_data_list: I'm with you all the way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. I suppose I should never have doubted
you.
